title: helianthemum polifolium var. tomentellum
intro: Helianthemum polifolium var. tomentellum, also known as Rockrose, is a flowering plant species that belongs to the family Cistaceae. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. Rockrose has been used to treat various health issues, such as wounds, skin irritations, and respiratory problems, due to its health benefits of promoting tissue repair, reducing inflammation, and boosting the immune system. Rockrose can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and salves for topical use, making it a versatile and accessible medicinal plant.
